update.releaseNotes:
v5.4.7 - Changelog
New --- - Replace the old `AppUpdater` library with a custom implementation with an updated UI. Will take effect in the next release.
Adjustments --- - Parse energy level updates for the `Remote Log Viewer`. - Improve Hammer and Glow Stick conservation logic for the finals. - Skip Reset Whistle when energy recovery is needed. - Block consecutive racing at critical energy (~0-1%) to avoid -30 stat penalty. - Skip `Irregular Training` analysis and racing at critical energy (~0-1%) with 3+ consecutive races.
